untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tick-level order execution logic (dynamic limit price adjustment, order fill conditions based on tick direction confirmation) which cannot be expressed using OHLCV bar-based indicators. The core mechanism—'latches_upward_only_on_direction_confirmation' and conditional order fills—requires real-time tick data and order state management beyond backtest engine scope. Approximated as directional price reversals only.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally an order execution rule for live trading, not a price-based entry/exit signal. The tick-sensitive mechanism adjusts limit orders dynamically based on last-trade-price direction. Backtesting this requires tick-by-tick data and order management logic. Translated downtick (close < prev_close) for buy and uptick (close > prev_close) for sell as closest approximation, but this loses the dynamic limit price adjustment feature which is the signal's core intent.
